case_title: TERESA CANDELARIA VS. PAMELA ESCALONA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALONA, PAMELA
